name: Nakanishi Mfg. Co., Ltd.
summary: Nakanishi Mfg. Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells commercial kitchen equipment primarily in Japan. It offers cleaning system, rice system, disinfection storage, cooking and heating, and other equipment. The company markets its products to schools, hospitals, offices, fast food shops, restaurants, etc. Nakanishi Mfg. Co., Ltd. was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
